ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "card_member" TEXT /* Indicates whether the customer is a card member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount_spent" TEXT /* Amount spent in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g. online, in-store, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "transaction_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that the item was purchased in */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of customers in this segment */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of customers in this segment */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income of customers in this segment */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income of customers in this segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market segment assigned to the customer */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was assigned to this segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segments_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spending_scores" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "spending_score" INTEGER /* Spending score of the customer (1-100) */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the spending score was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, analyst, marketer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g. login, logout, data access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
